hero.title:
The Execution Terminal
for Legal Professionals
hero.subtitle: One unified workspace for Due Diligence, Compliance, and Litigation. Verify with AI, trace every claim, and draft with confidence.

ui.risk_desc: Clause 4.2 conflicts with labor laws provided in context.

step1.title: 1. Import & Organize
step1.desc: Drag and drop thousands of files. We automatically classify contracts, evidence, and memos.

step2.title: 2. Structure Data
step2.desc: AI extracts key entities: parties, dates, amounts. Turn messy documents into structured tables.

step3.title: 3. Verify & Trace
step3.desc: Check claims against evidence. Every fact is linked to its source document for instant review.

step4.title: 4. Draft & Export
step4.desc: Generate memos or filings. Export typically takes hours, now done in seconds.

efficiency.title: 10x Efficiency
efficiency.desc: Split-screen workspace with integrated temporary storage and clipboard history. Stop switching apps.

risk.title: Risk Control
risk.desc: Every verification is traceable. Review the evidence chain and audit logs for full compliance.

assets.title: Knowledge Assets
assets.desc: Transform your due diligence and drafting work into reusable project assets for your team.

feature_wall.title: Everything you need
feature_wall.subtitle: Built for the modern legal workflow. No bloat, just power.

footer.description: The AI-powered execution terminal for legal professionals. Streamline due diligence, compliance, and litigation.

login.title: Log In
login.desc: Please log in to access your workspace.
